headline: Analog Devices (ADI) Wins Higher Price Target as AI Chip Boom Accelerates
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 2.47%, Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is among the 7 Best Battery Technology Stocks to Buy for Grid Storage. On June 29, Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target on Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) to $550 from $510 while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm cited the accelerating […]
